node.statement: AMPLITUDE DAMPING: N(ρ) = K_0ρK_0† + K_1ρK_1† with K_0 = diag(1,√(1-γ)), K_1 = ((0,√γ),(0,0)). Non-unital channel, so g_{s,e} ≠ 0. However, the finite-depth correction scaling (Ne^{-2t/τ} for Setup I, 1/t for Setup II) is unchanged. H_2(γ) = -log_d[1-(2-γ)γ/2] + log_d[1+γ^2]. [Eq.(28), Fig.5, main.tex lines 396-405]
